reference: Hi, I am a forty-eight-year-old male who has been in a few bad car and motorcycle accidents and has also broken bones for years. I have had an artificial knee since one thousand, nine hundred and eighty-nine. I am on thirty milligrams of oxycodone four times a day since two thousand and four. They don't seem to work as well anymore. I'm wondering what I can take along with it to help it.
text: Hi, I am a forty-eight-year-old male who has been in a few bad car and motorcycle accidents and has also broken bones. Is, I have had an artificial knee since one thousand nine hundred and eighty-nine. I am on thirty millivoxycodon four times a day since two thousand and four. They don't seem to work as well anymore. I'm wondering what I can take along with it to help it.
